title: taraxacum teres
intro: Taraxacum teres, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion or teres dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and skin problems. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving liver function, due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Taraxacum teres can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of various ailments.
